prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: PRF-PFT-BSHANDBOOK-BSHB Product Type: ABIS_BOOK Brand (from catalog): Productive Fitness Existing Title: Productive Fitness The Great Balance and Stability Handbook Exercise Handbook Guide Description: Whether you’re a beginner or a seasoned fitness expert, the Great Balance and Stability Handbook from Productive Fitness is a must-have workout accessory for anyone looking to achieve success in sports and fitness. This handbook provides insight into how important good balance is and comes jam-packed with information suitable for beginners and advanced fitness enthusiasts.

Inside the handbook, you’ll find instructions for 88 common balance and stability exercises that can provide a full-body workout. The handbook clearly explains how to set up a personal workout program that will suit your goals. Learn how to safely use a balance ball, wobble board, balance cushions, and extreme balance boards.

The handbook comes with 64 pages printed in color and features muscle anatomy diagrams so you can visualize your progress. The compact-sized handbook easily fits inside just about any backpack, travel bag, or gym bag. Search Terms: personal trainer gym equipment exercise muscle groups workout balance ball stability guidebook instructions Features: - BALANCE AND STABILITY HANDBOOK - Productive Fitness “The Great Balance and Stability Handbook” provides insight into how important good balance is to succeeding in sports and fitness; Jam-packed with information suitable for beginners and advanced fitness enthusiasts - 88 EXERCISES - Balance and stability handbook features instructions for 88 common balance and stability exercises for a full body workout; Handbook clearly explains how to set up a personal workout program to suit your goals - COMPLETE GUIDE - Handbook teaches how to use a balance ball, wobble board, balance cushions, and extreme balance boards; Great for all exercise levels - DIAGRAMS INCLUDED - Handbook comes with 64 pages and features muscle anatomy diagrams so you can visualize your progress; Printed in color - COMPACT SIZE - Handbook measures 8” x 5”; Easily fits inside of most backpacks, travel bags, and gym bags === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Productive Fitness Great Balance and Stability Handbook

openai.item_name: Productive Fitness Great Balance And Stability Exercise Handbook

anthropic.title_differentiation: 88 Exercises, 64 Color Pages, Muscle Anatomy Diagrams, Balance Ball And Wobble Board Guide

openai.title_differentiation: 88 Balance Exercises, 64 Color Pages, Muscle Anatomy Diagrams, Beginner To Advanced, Compact 8" X 5" Guide
